name: Margin Notes
description: Quiet two-column personal blog with Fraunces serif headings and Inter body. Title, tagline, top menu, theme toggle, sidebar with blog info and recent posts, post detail with TOC and threaded comments.

primary.title: Primary Menu
primary.description: Header navigation rendered as small uppercase tracked links

footer.title: Footer Menu
footer.description: Compact footer link list (legal pages and shortcuts)

sidebar.title: Sidebar Widgets
sidebar.description: Right-hand sidebar stack on home, archive, taxonomy, post, and page templates
